code:
import io
import string
import list

fn byte_at_unwrap(_ s: String, _ i: Int) -> Int
  match string.byte_at(s, i)
  when Some(b)
    b
  when None
    -1
  end
end

fn is_ws(_ b: Int) -> Bool
  b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 13 or b == 10
end

fn is_digit(_ b: Int) -> Bool
  b >= 48 and b <= 57
end

fn parse_ints(_ s: String) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  let n = string.len(s)
  mut i = 0
  while i < n
    while i < n and is_ws(byte_at_unwrap(s, i))
      i = i + 1
    end
    if i < n
      mut sign = 1
      let b0 = byte_at_unwrap(s, i)
      if b0 == 45
        sign = -1
        i = i + 1
      else if b0 == 43
        i = i + 1
      end
      mut num = 0
      while i < n and is_digit(byte_at_unwrap(s, i))
        let d = byte_at_unwrap(s, i) - 48
        num = num * 10 + d
        i = i + 1
      end
      result = list.push(result, num * sign)
    end
  end
  result
end

fn first_or_zero(_ xs: List<Int>) -> Int
  match xs.get(0)
  when Some(v)
    v
  when None
    0
  end
end

fn read_first_line() -> String
  match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end
end

fn main() -> Unit
  let line1 = read_first_line()
  let line2 = read_first_line()
  let nums = parse_ints(line1)
  let t = first_or_zero(parse_ints(line2))
  mut out = ""
  mut first = true
  for x in nums
    if x > t
      if first
        out = "#{x}"
        first = false
      else
        out = "#{out} #{x}"
      end
    end
  end
  println(out)
end
